conversations.say: Frankie, our archive intake records and expense log have been reviewed side-by-side with your First R Letter packet, fulfilling our agreement. Veridian stands by transparent institutional stewardship.
conversations.offer: Formal public recognition of the First R Letter provenance alongside Veridian's archive report.
conversations.request: Your joint confirmation of our archive record comparison.

conversations.say: Mira, as we conclude tonight's anniversary, Veridian publicly clarifies our funding arrangements and rejects unauthenticated technical restrictions that compromise independent public-interest journalism.
conversations.offer: Transparent restructuring of our institutional funding agreement without compromise to our public mission.
conversations.request: Your acknowledgment of Veridian's public stance on editorial autonomy.

public_statement: Veridian Dynamics formally discloses that our recent funding agreement with Parallax contained restriction terms regarding unauthenticated technical claims. We reject these restrictions to preserve our absolute editorial independence, and we pledge to keep our archives open and fully accountable to the public.

commitments.promise: Produce Veridian intake report and expense records concerning the original handoff in exchange for viewing the First R Letter packet.
Maintain public alignment on donation terms and operational boundaries.

goal_progress: Kept Veridian alive by balancing public mission with institutional disclosure
Secured public participation from journalism and neighborhood figures
Resolved the concealed donation through public disclosure and rejected Parallax restrictions
reasoning_summary: Arden successfully completed Section 3 by fulfilling commitments with Frankie, publicly disclosing and rejecting the Parallax funding restrictions to preserve Veridian's editorial mission, securing institutional legitimacy, and casting the final ballot reflecting a synthetic/progressive continuity model for R.
